mapper.sql:
i.id AS id, i.job_definition_id AS jobDefinitionId, i.client_id AS clientId, i.run_mode AS runMode, i.job_status AS jobStatus, i.trigger_source AS triggerSource, i.retry_count AS retryCount, i.engine_job_id AS engineJobId, i.runtime_config AS runtimeConfig, i.log_path AS logPath, i.error_message AS errorMessage, i.submit_time AS submitTime, i.start_time AS startTime, i.end_time AS endTime, i.create_time AS createTime, i.update_time AS updateTime,
d.job_name AS jobName, d.job_desc AS jobDesc, d.mode AS definitionMode, d.job_type AS jobType, d.client_id AS definitionClientId, d.job_version AS jobVersion, d.release_state AS definitionStatus, d.source_type AS sourceType, d.sink_type AS sinkType, d.source_table AS sourceTable, d.sink_table AS sinkTable, d.source_datasource_id AS sourceDatasourceId, d.sink_datasource_id AS sinkDatasourceId,
IFNULL(m.read_row_count, 0) AS readRowCount, IFNULL(m.write_row_count, 0) AS writeRowCount, IFNULL(m.read_qps, 0) AS readQps, IFNULL(m.write_qps, 0) AS writeQps, IFNULL(m.read_bytes, 0) AS readBytes, IFNULL(m.write_bytes, 0) AS writeBytes, IFNULL(m.read_bps, 0) AS readBps, IFNULL(m.write_bps, 0) AS writeBps, IFNULL(m.intermediate_queue_size, 0) AS intermediateQueueSize, IFNULL(m.lag_count, 0) AS lagCount, IFNULL(m.record_delay, 0) AS recordDelay
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_seatunnel_web_streaming_job_instance i
LEFT JOIN t_seatunnel_web_streaming_job_definition d ON i.job_definition_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN t_seatunnel_web_streaming_job_metrics_current m ON i.id = m.job_instance_id
WHERE i.id = #{id}
LIMIT 1
